label: 0d20
warning:
The acceleration setting exceeds the printer's maximum acceleration (machine_max_acceleration_extruding).
Orca will automatically cap the acceleration speed to ensure it doesn't surpass the printer's capabilities.
You can adjust the machine_max_acceleration_extruding value in your printer's configuration to get higher speeds.
